decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (project_125th-st-bus-service-improvement) already matches the exact registry record — same source_id (2012_09_19_125th_st_sbs_public_workshop_summary), same project_name ('Bus Service on 125th Street'), same project_type ('public workshop / planning study'), same status ('public workshop conducted'), same borough (Manhattan), and same description. The observation already resolves to its canonical record; no linking to a different record is needed. Per the rules, when the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The New York City Department of Transportation (DOT) and MTA New York City Transit (NYCT) conducted a Public Workshop on September 19, 2012
